3006030.name: Dissonant
3006030.description:
Dissonant doesn’t hold your hand—ever.

It doesn’t adapt to you. It doesn’t compromise.

Win, and the reward isn’t loot or stats—it’s resilience.

Warning: Dissonant may cause clenching, grinding, and character growth.

No builds
No stats
No safety net

Just you, the controls, and the consequences.

Dissonant is a love letter to difficult games—built by someone who grew up enjoying them and wanted a way to translate that joy (and frustration) to family members who don’t get it.

The controls are deliberately simple. The challenge isn’t complexity—it’s keeping your head when the game refuses to meet you halfway.

Features

  • A distilled dose of patience therapy

  • Simple mechanics you can play with 1 or 2 buttons.

  • Fragile progress — one mistake can erase a lot

  • Controller support

What this game aims to ask

Dissonant asks how you react when you fail and whether you keep trying anyway.

Important Warning

Game about patience is challenging and not for everyone.
